description: HDS autonomous-loop backlog + verifier contract. Read docs/ai/LOOP_ENGINEERING.md. Validated by `pnpm loop:validate`. The loop only ever dispatches units that are status:backlog, not human-only, and whose acceptanceChecks all resolve to a real gate or pnpm verifier.

units.title: Loop harness smoke check
units.brief: No product change. Prove the harness can select → dispatch → verify (typecheck) → mark done end-to-end. Used to validate the loop before any real unit is turned on.

units.title: Card diet — remove legacy noPadding + padding/gap props
units.brief: Remove the legacy noPadding/padding/gap props from Card via the deprecation lifecycle (warn + ledger + @removeIn) established in task #15. check-deprecations proves every @deprecated has a future @removeIn target.

units.title: Collapse isDark prop-drilling → theme context/hook
units.brief: Replace isDark prop-drilling across doc/lab components with a theme context/hook. Self-contained; layout integrity proves no visual regression.

units.title: Converge polymorphism on asChild/Slot (Radix Slot)
units.brief: Move ad-hoc `as` props to Radix Slot/asChild. Cross-cutting and architectural — no single mechanical check proves correctness, so it is human-only until decomposed into gate-verifiable sub-units.

units.title: Consolidate prose-doc source-of-truth mirrors
units.brief: Pick canonical sources among DESIGN.md / DESIGN-HANDOFF.md / llms.txt / manifest and cut duplication. Subjective editorial judgement — not mechanically verifiable, so human-only.

units.title: Standardize aria-label prop to DOM-style
units.brief: Converged Tag/SegmentedControl/Token onto DOM-style aria-label (commit 65b107e). Recorded here as a worked example: typecheck + test:a11y were its mechanical acceptance checks.
